entries.name: Sabre Corporation
entries.description: Global distribution system and travel technology provider investing heavily in AI-powered retailing and pricing.
aiFeatures: Sabre Travel AI for intelligent retailing
entries.notes: Investing heavily in AI retailing capabilities since 2024. Partnered with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure.

entries.name: Travelport
entries.description: Travel commerce platform connecting buyers and sellers of travel with modernized AI-driven content aggregation.
entries.notes: Modernized platform with focus on NDC and AI content. Strong push into agency tools.

entries.name: Booking Holdings
entries.description: Parent company of Booking.com, Priceline, Kayak — largest OTA group with aggressive AI investment.
aiFeatures: AI trip planner chatbot on Booking.com
entries.notes: Largest online travel company by revenue. AI chatbot live globally. Potential to disintermediate GDS.

entries.name: Expedia Group
entries.description: Major OTA operating Expedia, Hotels.com, Vrbo with significant AI and conversational commerce push.
entries.notes: Early adopter of ChatGPT plugin. Building full conversational commerce experience.

entries.name: Trip.com Group
entries.description: Asia-Pacific focused OTA with advanced AI capabilities across the travel booking journey.
aiFeatures: Multilingual AI translation for global travelers
entries.notes: Dominant in China and expanding globally. TripGenie shows advanced conversational AI capabilities.

entries.name: Airbnb
entries.description: Alternative accommodation platform expanding into full trip experiences with AI-driven personalization.
entries.notes: Focus on AI for host tools and guest experience. Expanding into experiences beyond stays.
